research.status_summary: Persefoni is independently operating and selectively hiring (~295 employees) after a significant strategic partnership with Diligent (Oct 2025) in which Diligent took an equity stake and transitioned its carbon accounting clients to Persefoni; internal Glassdoor reviews note recurring layoff cycles tied to market conditions.
research.hiring_policy: Persefoni lists only ~6 open roles globally (per LinkedIn) as of June 2026, suggesting a lean/selective hiring posture; the company has offices in the US, UK, Singapore, Japan, Canada, and Germany but no confirmed public stance on visa sponsorship or EOR arrangements — candidates should verify directly.
recent_news: Named to TIME's list of America's Top GreenTech Companies 2026 (March 26, 2026)

Strategic partnership with Diligent (Oct 2025): Diligent took an equity position in Persefoni and transitioned its carbon accounting client base to Persefoni's platform, expanding Persefoni's enterprise reach
Targeting profitability in H2 2026 after raising $195M total; no new funding round announced in 2026 to date
research.growth_signal: Persefoni is pushing toward profitability in H2 2026, has absorbed Diligent's carbon accounting client base as a strategic influx, and is ranked among top carbon accounting platforms in 2026 market comparisons, but headcount remains flat at ~295 and open roles are sparse.
research.fit_for_lior: Weak fit — Persefoni is a compliance-driven B2B carbon SaaS with an embedded AI Copilot (LLM-based), which touches the AI-product angle, but the domain is ESG/climate regulatory reporting with no creative AI, consumer product, or vibe-coding surface; better as a market-awareness data point than an active application target.
